title: GSSSB Surveyor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 47 Posts
shortInfo: The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has officially announced the Surveyor, Class-3 Recruitment 2026 with 47 openings. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 33 years (with relaxation for disabled candidates) and hold a Diploma in Civil Engineering or equivalent, along with basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi, can now submit their online applications from 15 May 2026 to 29 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below

basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Surveyor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 47 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has officially announced the Surveyor, Class-3 Recruitment 2026 with 47 openings. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 33 years (with relaxation for disabled candidates) and hold a Diploma in Civil Engineering or equivalent, along with basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi, can now submit their online applications from 15 May 2026 to 29 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18, Max: 33 years (with relaxation for disabled candidates)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 33 years Age Relaxation: Up to 10 years (Male, General Category), 15 years (Female, General Category), 15 years (Male, Reserved Category), 20 years (Female, Reserved Category) for Disabled Candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Civil Engineering or equivalent, Basic knowledge of computer application, Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi.
qualification.details: Diploma in Civil Engineering obtained from an Institutions recognised by the Government or any of the Universities established or incorporated by or under the Central or State Act in India; or any other educational institutions recognised as such or declared to be deemed as University under Section-3 of the University Grants Commission Act, 1956; OR posses an equivalent qualification recognised by the Government: Provided that the candidate holding Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering shall not be eligible to apply. Have passed one/two years Surveyor course from the Industrial Training Institute recognised by the Government. Basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967 Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 26,000/- (Fixed for first 5 years), then Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- (Level-4)
salary_details.details: Fixed pay of Rs. 26,000/- per month for the first five years. After completion of five years, if the service is satisfactory, the candidate will be eligible for regular appointment in the pay scale of Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- (Level-4) of the Seventh Pay Commission.

selection_process: Competitive Examination (MCQ - Computer Based Response Test) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSSSB Surveyor, Class-3 Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Surveyor, Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the GSSSB Surveyor, Class-3 recruitment is 29-05-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this date to be considered.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the Surveyor, Class-3 post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 33 years. Age relaxation is applicable for disabled candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Surveyor, Class-3 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma in Civil Engineering or an equivalent qualification. A basic knowledge of computer applications and proficiency in Gujarati or Hindi is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the GSSSB Surveyor, Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for Unreserved category candidates and Rs. 300/- for Reserved category candidates, including women, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, Ex-Servicemen, and Disabled individuals.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Surveyor, Class-3 position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Competitive Examination (MCQ - Computer Based Response Test) followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the starting salary for the Surveyor, Class-3 post?
faq.answer: Initially, candidates will receive a fixed pay of Rs. 26,000/- per month for the first five years. After regularization, the salary will be in the pay scale of Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- (Level-4).

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates with a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering apply for this post?
faq.answer: No, candidates holding a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering are not eligible to apply for this Surveyor, Class-3 post.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for the GSSSB Surveyor, Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article or from the GSSSB official website.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for disabled candidates, with different durations for male/female and general/reserved categories, ranging up to 20 years.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Surveyor, Class-3 post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 47 vacancies announced for the Surveyor, Class-3 post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Surveyor, Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the GSSSB Surveyor, Class-3 recruitment is 29-05-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this date to be considered.
